title: mentha longifolia subsp. mollissima
intro: Mentha longifolia subsp. mollissima, also known as Moroccan spearmint, is a subspecies of mint that is native to the Mediterranean region and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid due to its high content of menthone and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia subsp. mollissima include relief from digestive issues, nausea, and headaches, as well as its potential to aid in reducing stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
